leadText: The Autograph (Japanese: マチスのサイン Matisse's Signature) is an item introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Autograph serves no practical purpose.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The autograph you got from the Vermilion City Gym Leader , Lt. Surge . He wrote, "Good luck!" In the Japanese version of this item description, Lt. Surge wrote "Good luck!" in English as well. This is related to his habit of using English words and phrases in the Japanese dialogue. This "Good luck!" text found in the Japanese version is written using regular English letters, not katakana.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price P E N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Autograph serves no practical purpose. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The autograph you got from the Vermilion City Gym Leader , Lt. Surge . He wrote, "Good luck!" In the Japanese version of this item description, Lt. Surge wrote "Good luck!" in English as well. This is related to his habit of using English words and phrases in the Japanese dialogue. This "Good luck!" text found in the Japanese version is written using regular English letters, not katakana. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods P E Vermilion Gym (reward for defeating Lt. Surge )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] An identical autograph to this one can also be found in the player's room in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon .
